verses.text: Kumpipa Lemuel, a nu in a thuhilhna
Kong it mahmah ka ta aw, thu ngenngenin kong neih ka tapa na hi hi. Nangma tungah bang teng hong gen ding ka hi hiam
Na thatang teng numei tungah beisak kei in la, na sum khempeuh numei tungah zang kei in. Numei in kumpipa siasak thei hi
Lemuel aw, ka thugen hong ngai in. Kumpite in zu nek huailo a, mi ukte in khamtheihzu a duh ding hilo hi
Zu ne le uh, thukham mangngilh uh a, thukham hei-in mizawngte gim pia khathei uh hi
A si dekdekte, khamtheihzu pia in la, a lungkham mahmahte, leenggahzu pia in
Amaute nesak lecin a zawn'na uh mangngilhin, a lungkhamna uh phawk nawnlo ding uh hi
Thu a gen theilo mite-a' dingin thu gensak in la, a huh ding a omlo mite pan'pih in
Amau-a' ding thu genin thu a tangin khen in la, a zawng a cimawh mite amau-a' dingin a kilawm hamphatna ngahsak in.
Zi hoih pen suangmanpha sangin manphazaw pek a, ahi zongin zi hoih ngah ding haksa mahmah hi
A pasal in muang mahmah a, a innsung uhah annek kitasam ngeilo uh hi
Amah in a khan' tawntungin a pasal tungah thupha bawl a, a pasal tungah thusia tun' ngeilo hi
Amah in samul leh khau zongin thanuam takin na sem hi
Amah in sumbukte' van pua teembaw bangin gamlapi panin an hong ciahpih hi
Phalvak tungin zingtho a, annek ding teng limtakin bawlin a nasem numeite' sep dingteng a vaihawmsak hi
Amah in leitang hoih penpen zong a, a thalawhsa sum tawh a leenggui lo ding a lei hi
A nik singten'in a puanban zial a, thalawp takin na a sem hi
Amah in a nasepte a manphatna thei a, zankim zankhang dongin nakpi takin na a sem hi
Amah in khau kheekin a puan ding gantawm hi
A zawng mite tungah amah cingh mahmah a, a cimawh mite tungah huhna a pia hi
A innkuan buppi puanlum guanzo ahih manin phalbi tun' ding lunghimawh lo hi
Amah in a puan ding khuitawm a, saihadial puansan vive a silhzo hi
Thukhen upate lakah a pasal a tut ciangin mite' lakah a kitheikim mi khat ahi hi
Amah in puan khui-in kawnggakte zong bawl a, sumbukte tungah tuate a zuak hi
Amah a tha hatin zong kizahtak a, mailam hun-a ding a lung pataulo hi
Amah in a pilna tawh thu gen a, kam khum takin pau hiathiat hi
Amah in a innkuansung kisapna teng sem a, a tawntungin manlah den hi
A tate in amah it mahmah uh a, a pasal in zong pakta mahmah a
“Zi hoih tampi a om tei hangin nang kan-a hoih kuamah om kei,” ci-in a phat hi
Ngaihbaan'na pen zuaupi hithei a, melhoihna zong maimang thei hi. Ahi zongin Topa a zahtak numei a phattaak ahi hi
A sepna khempeuh hangin amah phat un. Mi khempeuh in a zahtak dingin a kilawm ahi hi.
